name: Banana Peach Shake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mashed ripe bananas (about 2 large), frozen
recipeInstructions:
You can mash and freeze overripe bananas to have on hand for this refreshing shake. The ingredients can be doubled easily to make 6 servings.
Place all ingredients in a blender. Cover and blend about 30 seconds or until smooth. Serve immediately over ice cubes.
3 servings
Banana-Apricot Shake: Substitute 1 cup apricot nectar for the peach nectar. Add 1/4 teaspoon vanilla to the mixture in the blender.
